activate.title: Ready to Activate?
activate.description: Once activated, the status changes to Active and the voting period opens.

logo.title: Organisation Logo
logo.subtitle: Displayed on the election page seen by voters
logo.file_hint: PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG · max 2 MB

statistics.title: Voting Statistics
statistics.empty_desc: Add members to this election to track voter statistics.

applications.title: Candidacy Applications
applications.subtitle: Review and approve candidacy applications from members

confirm.activate: Are you sure you want to activate this election? The status will change to active and voting can begin.
confirm.publish: Are you sure you want to publish the election results? This will make them available to all voters.
confirm.unpublish: Are you sure you want to unpublish the election results?
confirm.open_voting: Are you sure you want to open the voting period? Voters will be able to cast their votes.
confirm.close_voting: Are you sure you want to close the voting period? No new votes will be accepted.
